name: auto-pilot
description: Autonomous PM-Worker-Reviewer development loop. Opus 4.7 PM dispatches Sonnet 4.6 (1M) workers in parallel, gates each ticket through Codex+Claude dual adversarial review, runs phase verify checklists (test/lint/typecheck/build), commits and advances phases until spec is complete. Full auto, no confirms. Also bundles the author's quality/review, harness-doc, and debugging skills, the setup-harness bootstrapper (skill + 8 harness-* commands + 3 harness agents), and safety hooks as a personal toolkit.
